lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner used to validate the combat loadout, power budget and shield/hull tank on this hull.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Diamondback Explorer ship page — manufacturer specs and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Authoritative hardpoint sizes (1 Large, 2 Medium), optional-internal slots, base shield/armour and class-4 cores cited in the stat tables.

sources.label: Inara — Diamondback Explorer
sources.what: Ship overview cross-checked for hardpoint layout, internals, hull price and the absence of any rank or pad gate for combat fits.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous Wiki
sources.what: Diamondback Explorer lore, manufacturer, and its low heat-signature profile relevant to the combat heat-edge discussion.
